Hey, what's going on everyone? This is something that we're gonna start implementing right now, so you should do this, ASAP. Print this out, eliminate it, and put it on the desk that you're doing sales. And so what it is here is the statement that you're going to have them understand. So this is after they've made the sale, they've given their payment, they've signed everything, right? You're gonna say, hey, would you like to know something that helps people lose more weight? I'm gonna say yes, you're like, awesome. So people who believe this statement above, we rewrite it in their own words, don't copy it, work for it, and sign the statement, lose more weight than those who don't. If you'd like to unlock the power of written affirmations, rewrite the statement above in your own words, then sign it below. And so it says, I am consistent and honest, I mean what I say and I follow through with my commitments. I do not like bad habits surpass my desire to grow and improve, I prioritize my health above the air and load trees, I will not give up on myself, I will not make excuses and quit. And so you're gonna have them read that, agree to it, and then rewrite it in their own words and then sign it. And you can have them do that on the back of the contract. And then what it does is it uses some subconscious stuff to basically align people's identities with their behaviors and then make that behavior consistent with something that we want. So we're telling them that they're consistent and honest. And so they mean what they say, so they've already told us that they're gonna do it. So if they don't do it, then they're not consistent, they're not honest. Right, and so we want them to, we wanna use that to our advantage so we can get them to stick with the program. Because typically about 20% of people who signed up will cancel before the first million or the first week, just because of whatever reasons. So this is something that we do to combat that. So use it and unlock the power.
